# 2026-06-27 Incorporation Pass

Implemented requested review notes:

- Moved the music player off the global page controls and into `/local-music-arts/`.
- Added balanced county task pages for ads, business, nonprofits, and calendars across Colfax, Las Animas, and Huerfano.
- Added searchable list controls to source/directories and inventory-lead sections.
- Added county color themes and historical/heritage landmark cues.
- Incorporated the generated spreadsheet workbook at `/data/MAILCHIMP_DIRECTORY_WORKBOOK_2026-06-27.xlsx` and linked it from the home page/footer.
- Expanded the footer with county task routes, culture/music, sources, sitemap, workbook, CSV, JSON, templates, and update intake.

Kept the site static and dependency-free.
